verbatim_quote: So those are little like symbolized videos of cars being, being looked at from, from the top on the highway. The central car here is fixed, and this is you not trying to predict what the cars around it are going to do.
gloss: [ANALOGY] So those are little like symbolized videos of cars being, being looked at from, from the top on the highway. The central car here is fixed, and this is you not trying to predict...
